title: Waffle's Terracotta Plaster
body: ![A house built with plastered bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I7mv6L5j/images/21eb9aa9a2550f062c1adf42b2c0b123b22797bf.png) This mod adds bricks, cobblestone, deepslate bricks, mud bricks and stone bricks plastered at multiple stages of weathering with any colour of terracotta, for a rustic look to your builds. ![Plastered bricks in various colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I7mv6L5j/images/e1dfdf82fce39f561120582ee89cfb5dfb92a20a.png) Also includes stairs, slabs, walls, gates, fences, trapdoors, carpets, pressure plates and buttons for each terracotta colour. ![Terracotta block variants in various colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I7mv6L5j/images/9a7a507a29ca8c67c9fe10189ab354a2f71654c1.png) ![Glazed terracotta block variants in various colours](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/I7mv6L5j/images/5bb0d4d614c277601bd8b73c9615901d05c6773d.png) To plaster, craft one brick with one, two or three blocks of terracotta. ## Check out my other mods! [Waffle's Moss](https://modrinth.com/mod/waffles-moss) [Waffle's Placeable Foods](https://modrinth.com/mod/waffles-placeable-foods)
